events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: flanged joints in-progress, observed field condition is wrong gasket type/material for service. This is a sequence/procedure check. Wrong gasket material for service is a non-compliance/defective condition. Work cannot continue until the correct gasket is selected/installed. Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk high. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 30. Need actions: stop work, remove wrong gasket, verify service conditions, procure correct gasket per OEM/ASME PCC-1, reinstall. References ASME PCC-1, B16.5.

  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the flanged joint immediately",

    "Reassemble and torque to the specified bolt-up procedure before returning to service"

  "rationale": "An incorrect gasket material for the service is a non-compliant, installed-defective condition. Continuing assembly would create an unsafe joint, so work must stop and the gasket must be replaced before proceeding.",

}
